channel.title: github_trending
channel.description: Latest posts from https://github.com/trending. follow.is: None

item.title: PriorLabs /TabPFN | Python | N/A
item.description: ⚡ TabPFN: Foundation Model for Tabular Data ⚡

item.title: forrestchang /andrej-karpathy-skills | N/A | N/A
item.description: A single CLAUDE.md file to improve Claude Code behavior, derived from Andrej Karpathy's observations on LLM coding pitfalls.

item.title: browserbase /skills | JavaScript | N/A
item.description: Claude Agent SDK with a web browsing tool

item.title: LearningCircuit /local-deep-research | Python | N/A
item.description: ~95% on SimpleQA (e.g. Qwen3.6-27B on a 3090). Supports all local and cloud LLMs (llama.cpp, Ollama, Google, ...). 10+ search engines - arXiv, PubMed, your private documents. Everything Local & Encrypted.

item.title: AIDC-AI /Pixelle-Video | Python | N/A
item.description: 🚀 AI 全自动短视频引擎 | AI Fully Automated Short Video Engine

item.title: Arindam200 /awesome-ai-apps | Python | N/A
item.description: A collection of projects showcasing RAG, agents, workflows, and other AI use cases

item.title: jwasham /coding-interview-university | N/A | N/A
item.description: A complete computer science study plan to become a software engineer.

item.title: msitarzewski /agency-agents | Shell | N/A
item.description: A complete AI agency at your fingertips - From frontend wizards to Reddit community ninjas, from whimsy injectors to reality checkers. Each agent is a specialized expert with personality, processes, and proven deliverables.

item.title: cocoindex-io /cocoindex | Python | N/A
item.description: Incremental engine for long horizon agents 🌟 Star if you like it!

item.title: mksglu /context-mode | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: Context window optimization for AI coding agents. Sandboxes tool output, 98% reduction. 14 platforms

item.title: bwya77 /vscode-dark-islands | PowerShell | N/A
item.description: VSCode theme based off the easemate IDE and Jetbrains islands theme

item.title: docusealco /docuseal | Ruby | N/A
item.description: Open source DocuSign alternative. Create, fill, and sign digital documents ✍️

item.title: virattt /dexter | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: An autonomous agent for deep financial research

item.title: ruvnet /ruflo | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: 🌊 The leading agent orchestration platform for Claude. Deploy intelligent multi-agent swarms, coordinate autonomous workflows, and build conversational AI systems. Features enterprise-grade architecture, self-learning swarm intelligence, RAG integration, and native Claude Code / Codex Integration

item.title: Hmbown /DeepSeek-TUI | Rust | N/A
item.description: Coding agent for DeepSeek models that runs in your terminal
